name: git-kit
description: Generate commit messages with Ollama, toggle file exclude rules, and checkout files from another branch.

commands.title: Git Kit: Checkout File From Branch

gitKit.model.description: Ollama model used to generate commit messages.

gitKit.systemPrompt.default:
Generate exactly one conventional commit message for the staged git changes below.
Rules:
- Return only the final commit message.
- Prefer a single-line subject with no body.
- Keep the subject concise and ideally under 72 characters.
- Use imperative mood.
- Choose the most accurate conventional type such as feat, fix, refactor, docs, test, chore, build, ci, perf, or style.
gitKit.systemPrompt.description: System prompt sent to Ollama. The staged diff is sent separately as the user message.

gitKit.diffMaxChars.description: Maximum git diff characters included in the prompt.

gitKit.requestTimeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for Ollama to respond.

gitKit.debug.description: Enable debug logs in the Git Kit output channel and write the Ollama payload to git-kit-request.json.

gitKit.applyToAllRepositories.description: When the command is run without a specific SCM repository context, generate commit messages for all open git repositories.
